project.title: En Sus Propios Poemas: The Life and Legacy of Diana Montejano
project.description: This project explores the life and legacy of Diana Montejano, a poet, civil rights activist, and educator who lived in San Antonio, Texas. It explores her life growing up in San Antonio's historic Mexican American westside, and how her experiences shaper her writing. A mixture of oral history, historical analysis, and poetry, "En Sus Propios Poemas" explores the pivotal Chicano movement through her life and her art.
project.creator: karaculp
